revision.comment: Bot: create automatic enwiki redirect
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Char]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 16:44:45
revision.text: {{{1}}}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: paler background per talk
revision.text: {{{1}}}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: Removing serif, looks very out of place. Increase padding, the small padding did not make the purpose of the borders obvious at all.
revision.text: {{{1}}}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: Nominated for deletion; see [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion#Template:Char]]
revision.text: {{Template for discussion/dated|action=|page=Char|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2020 July 6#Template:Char|type=inline|bigbox={{#invoke:Noinclude|noinclude|text=yes}}}} {{{1}}}{{documentation}}

revision.text: {{Template for discussion/dated|action=|page=Char|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2020 July 6#Template:Char|type=tiny|bigbox={{#invoke:Noinclude|noinclude|text=yes}}}} {{{1}}}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: that's not how you do it
revision.text: {{Template for discussion/dated|action=|page=Char|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2020 July 6#Template:Char|type=disabled|bigbox={{#invoke:Noinclude|noinclude|text=yes}}}}{{{1}}}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: Nor is this. I see no reason this template merits special treatment, unlike nearly all other transcluded templates listed at TfD
revision.text: {{Template for discussion/dated|action=|page=Char|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2020 July 6#Template:Char|type=inline|bigbox={{#invoke:Noinclude|noinclude|text=yes}}}}{{{1}}}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: Reverted to revision 966306748 by Nardog: Absolutely not possible in this case, completely ruines hundreds of articles and makes them incomprehensible. I will personally send notifications on each talk page where this template is used instead if that is requested. ([[WP:TW|TW]])
revision.text: {{Template for discussion/dated|action=|page=Char|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2020 July 6#Template:Char|type=disabled|bigbox={{#invoke:Noinclude|noinclude|text=yes}}}}{{{1}}}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: /* top */ Removed the serif selector as it seems to have been a primery complaint. Also this makes it much easier for editor to do their own font selection.
revision.text: {{Template for discussion/dated|action=|page=Char|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2020 July 6#Template:Char|type=disabled|bigbox={{#invoke:Noinclude|noinclude|text=yes}}}}{{{1}}}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: class="nounderlines"
revision.text: {{Template for discussion/dated|action=|page=Char|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2020 July 6#Template:Char|type=disabled|bigbox={{#invoke:Noinclude|noinclude|text=yes}}}}{{{1}}}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: Make into a no-op until an RfC happens; restore the [[WP:STATUSQUO]]. See my comment, soon to come, on [[Wikipedia:Templates_for_discussion/Log/2020_July_6#Template:Char]].
revision.text: {{Template for discussion/dated|action=|page=Char|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2020 July 6#Template:Char|type=disabled|bigbox={{#invoke:Noinclude|noinclude|text=yes}}}}<includeonly>{{{1}}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: (This is a null edit so therefore not a violation of [[WP:3RR]].) [[User:Spitzak|Spitzak]], that is exactly my proposal. Do nothing. The articles were fine before. Why does the MOS need changing all the way in 2020? We've had most of these articles for over 15 years. Nothing needs to change. You justify your change, I don't need to justify the status quo.
revision.text: {{Template for discussion/dated|page=Char|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2020 July 6#Template:Char|type=disabled|bigbox={{#invoke:Noinclude|noinclude|text=yes}}}}{{{1}}}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: /* top */
revision.text: {{Template for discussion/dated|page=Char|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2020 July 6#Template:Char|type=disabled|bigbox={{#invoke:Noinclude|noinclude|text=yes}}}}<includeonly>{{angbr|{{{1}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: TFD closed as keep ([[WP:XFDC|XFDcloser]])
revision.text: <includeonly>{{angbr|{{{1}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: /* top */ Reverted to the box, result of discussion will be inserted in the help
revision.text: {{{1}}}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: Add more padding to the character box
revision.text: {{{1}}}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: using dotted border and darker color to increase contrast
revision.text: {{{1}}}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: Undid revision 1137036951 by [[Special:Contributions/CactiStaccingCrane|CactiStaccingCrane]] ([[User talk:CactiStaccingCrane|talk]]) RV inadequately justified darker background. Keep dotted boundary as that is an improvement.
revision.text: {{{1}}}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: Use design tokens, for better compatibility with night mode
revision.text: {{{1}}}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: add missing fallback value for CSS variable, which was causing display issues in the mobile app's dark theme; see [[User_talk:Spitzak#template:char_and_dark_mode]]
revision.text: {{{1}}}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: Undid revision 966436652 by [[Special:Contributions/Vanisaac|Vanisaac]] ([[User talk:Vanisaac|talk]]) Care to explain at TfD what I misunderstood? Is this not what is meant by [[WP:BRD]]? Honestly, why should this template do anything until we know what we want it to do? {{u|Spitzak}} even said they'd accept it becoming an alias of {{Angbr}}. There's no [[WP:POINTY]]ness here; this is the very definition of the BRD cycle and STATUSQUO. Is it not?
revision.text: {{Template for discussion/dated|action=|page=Char|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2020 July 6#Template:Char|type=disabled|bigbox={{#invoke:Noinclude|noinclude|text=yes}}}}<includeonly>{{{1}}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: (This is a null edit so therefore not a violation of [[WP:3RR]].) [[User:Spitzak|Spitzak]], that is exactly my proposal. Do nothing. The articles were fine before. revision.comment: TFD closed as keep ([[WP:XFDC|XFDcloser]])
revision.text: <includeonly>{{angbr|{{{1}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: /* top */ Reverted to the box, result of discussion will be inserted in the help
revision.text: {{{1}}}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: Add more padding to the character box
revision.text: {{{1}}}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: using dotted border and darker color to increase contrast
revision.text: {{{1}}}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: Undid revision 1137036951 by [[Special:Contributions/CactiStaccingCrane|CactiStaccingCrane]] ([[User talk:CactiStaccingCrane|talk]]) RV inadequately justified darker background. Keep dotted boundary as that is an improvement.
revision.text: {{{1}}}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: Use design tokens, for better compatibility with night mode
revision.text: {{{1}}}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: add missing fallback value for CSS variable, which was causing display issues in the mobile app's dark theme; see [[User_talk:Spitzak#template:char_and_dark_mode]]
revision.text: {{{1}}}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 21:32:24
revision.text: {{{1}}}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: paler background per talk
revision.text: {{{1}}}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: Removing serif, looks very out of place. Increase padding, the small padding did not make the purpose of the borders obvious at all.
revision.text: {{{1}}}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: Nominated for deletion; see [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion#Template:Char]]
revision.text: {{Template for discussion/dated|action=|page=Char|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2020 July 6#Template:Char|type=inline|bigbox={{#invoke:Noinclude|noinclude|text=yes}}}} {{{1}}}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: rm extra line
revision.text: {{Template for discussion/dated|action=|page=Char|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2020 July 6#Template:Char|type=tiny|bigbox={{#invoke:Noinclude|noinclude|text=yes}}}}{{{1}}}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: that's not how you do it
revision.text: {{Template for discussion/dated|action=|page=Char|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2020 July 6#Template:Char|type=disabled|bigbox={{#invoke:Noinclude|noinclude|text=yes}}}}{{{1}}}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: Nor is this. I see no reason this template merits special treatment, unlike nearly all other transcluded templates listed at TfD
revision.text: {{Template for discussion/dated|action=|page=Char|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2020 July 6#Template:Char|type=inline|bigbox={{#invoke:Noinclude|noinclude|text=yes}}}}{{{1}}}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: Reverted to revision 966306748 by Nardog: Absolutely not possible in this case, completely ruines hundreds of articles and makes them incomprehensible. I will personally send notifications on each talk page where this template is used instead if that is requested. ([[WP:TW|TW]])
revision.text: {{Template for discussion/dated|action=|page=Char|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2020 July 6#Template:Char|type=disabled|bigbox={{#invoke:Noinclude|noinclude|text=yes}}}}{{{1}}}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: /* top */ Removed the serif selector as it seems to have been a primery complaint. Also this makes it much easier for editor to do their own font selection.
revision.text: {{Template for discussion/dated|action=|page=Char|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2020 July 6#Template:Char|type=disabled|bigbox={{#invoke:Noinclude|noinclude|text=yes}}}}{{{1}}}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: class="nounderlines"
revision.text: {{Template for discussion/dated|action=|page=Char|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2020 July 6#Template:Char|type=disabled|bigbox={{#invoke:Noinclude|noinclude|text=yes}}}}{{{1}}}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: Make into a no-op until an RfC happens; restore the [[WP:STATUSQUO]]. See my comment, soon to come, on [[Wikipedia:Templates_for_discussion/Log/2020_July_6#Template:Char]].
revision.text: {{Template for discussion/dated|action=|page=Char|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2020 July 6#Template:Char|type=disabled|bigbox={{#invoke:Noinclude|noinclude|text=yes}}}}<includeonly>{{{1}}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: (This is a null edit so therefore not a violation of [[WP:3RR]].) [[User:Spitzak|Spitzak]], that is exactly my proposal. Do nothing. The articles were fine before. Why does the MOS need changing all the way in 2020? We've had most of these articles for over 15 years. Nothing needs to change. You justify your change, I don't need to justify the status quo.
revision.text: {{Template for discussion/dated|page=Char|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2020 July 6#Template:Char|type=disabled|bigbox={{#invoke:Noinclude|noinclude|text=yes}}}}{{{1}}}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
